200

GET http://127.0.0.1:8000/scenario/profiler/baseline

Request

Request Attributes

KeyValue
_controller 
[ "App\Controller\ScenarioController" "profiler" ]
_route 
"scenario_profiler"
_route_params 
["case" => "baseline"]
